panels.description: Shows if training is currently active based on metric presence
panels.title: 🔴 Training Status

panels.description: Dual storage architecture: Local checkpoints + MLflow artifacts

options.content:
# 📁 Artifact Storage Locations (Dual Storage Architecture)

## 🏗️ Training Artifacts (Phase 1)

### Local Ray Checkpoints (Primary Storage)
```
Container: ray-head:/tmp/ray/checkpoints/face_detection/
Host Mount: /opt/shml-platform/ray_compute/data/ray/checkpoints/face_detection/

Structure:
├── best.pt                           # Best model by mAP50
├── last.pt                           # Most recent checkpoint  
├── checkpoint_epoch_XXXX_meta.json  # Checkpoint metadata
├── epoch_summary.json                # Training summary
├── epoch_table.txt                   # Metrics table
├── curriculum_progress.json          # Curriculum state
├── exports/                          # Model exports
│   ├── best.onnx                    # ONNX export (opset 17)
│   ├── best.engine                  # TensorRT FP16
│   └── best_int8.engine             # TensorRT INT8
├── failures/                         # Failure analysis
│   └── phase_X/
│       └── epoch_XXX_failures.json
└── audits/                           # Dataset audits
    └── audit_epoch_XXX.json
```

### MLflow Artifacts (Tracking & Registry)
```
MLflow UI: https://${PUBLIC_DOMAIN}/mlflow/
Experiment: Phase1-WIDER-Balanced (auto-created)

Container: mlflow-server:/mlflow/artifacts/{experiment_id}/{run_id}/
Host Mount: /opt/shml-platform/mlflow-server/data/mlflow/artifacts/

Structure:
├── artifacts/
│   ├── model/                       # Serialized model
│   ├── best.pt                      # Best checkpoint
│   ├── exports/                     # ONNX/TensorRT
│   └── analysis/                    # Failure/audit reports
├── metrics/                          # Time series metrics
├── params/                           # Hyperparameters
└── tags/                             # Run metadata
```

## 🔗 Job & Run Tracking

### Ray Job (Compute Orchestration)
```
Ray Dashboard: https://${PUBLIC_DOMAIN}/ray/
Ray Compute UI: https://${PUBLIC_DOMAIN}/ray-compute/

Job ID: Displayed in Ray dashboard (e.g., raysubmit_XXXXX)
Logs: docker logs ray-head -f
Status: Running/Succeeded/Failed
```

### MLflow Run (Experiment Tracking)
```
Run ID: Generated by MLflow (e.g., a1b2c3d4e5f6...)
Run Name: yolov8l-200ep-sota-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS
Experiment: Phase1-WIDER-Balanced
Tags: model_type=face_detection, architecture=yolov8l
```

## 📊 Metrics Sources

### Training Metrics (Real-time during training)
```
Source: TrainingMetricsCallback → Pushgateway
Prefix: training_*
Job: face_detection_training
Metrics: mAP50, recall, precision, loss, lr, epoch, etc.
```

### Evaluation Metrics (Post-training evaluation)
```
Source: Evaluation Pipeline → Pushgateway
Prefix: face_detection_*
Job: face_detection_evaluation
Metrics: map50, recall, precision, f1, gaps, targets
```

## 🎯 Quick Access Links
- MLflow Experiments: /mlflow/#/experiments
- Ray Dashboard: /ray/
- Ray Compute UI: /ray-compute/
- Pushgateway: http://localhost:9091/metrics
- Prometheus: http://localhost:9090/targets
